name: Write LXC Notes
description:
Writes the container notes/description for standard (non-docker-compose) apps.

Skipped for docker-compose apps (compose_file is set) - see 191-host-write-docker-compose-notes.json.

The notes contain:
- Hidden markers for machine parsing (oci-lxc-deployer:managed, oci-image, application-id, etc.)
- Visible Markdown content with application info, version, and links

parameters.name: Deployer Base URL
parameters.description: Auto-injected by backend: Base URL for log viewer links

parameters.name: VE Context Key
parameters.description: Auto-injected by backend: VE context identifier

parameters.name: Icon Base64
parameters.description: Auto-injected by backend: Base64-encoded application icon

parameters.name: Icon MIME Type
parameters.description: Auto-injected by backend: Icon MIME type (image/svg+xml or image/png)

parameters.name: Username
parameters.description: Username for volume permissions (stored for addon reconfiguration)

parameters.name: UID
parameters.description: UID for volume permissions (stored for addon reconfiguration)

parameters.name: GID
parameters.description: GID for volume permissions (stored for addon reconfiguration)

parameters.name: Is Deployer
parameters.description: Auto-injected by backend: Set to 'true' when installing oci-lxc-deployer itself

parameters.name: Stack Name
parameters.description: Auto-injected by backend: Stack name/id for dependency discovery
